name: Chaithanya Kumar Gogula
title: Senior VMware Administrator | Cloud & Virtualization Specialist
about: Senior VMware & Cloud Engineer with 9+ years of experience in enterprise virtualization, OCI cloud, OLVM/KVM environments, and large-scale datacenter operations. Proven ability to lead migrations, automate infrastructure, and maintain highly available systems with 99.99% uptime.

automation.name: ESXi Patch Reporting
automation.description: Automated ESXi patch compliance reporting using PowerCLI across clusters.

automation.name: Inventory Collection
automation.description: Scripted collection of VM, host, and datastore inventory across environments.

automation.name: Health Checks
automation.description: Automated daily health checks for VMware infrastructure.

automation.name: Citrix Migration Tool
automation.description: Automation tool to support Citrix workload migration.

automation.name: RAM Expansion Tool
automation.description: Bulk VM RAM expansion automation with validation.

automation.name: KeePass Retrieval Tool
automation.description: Secure credential retrieval automation using KeePass.
